ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "org_type" TEXT /* Type of the organization (e.g., Red Cross / Red Crescent) */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the organization's headquarters */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the organization */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON string containing links to the organization's social media profiles */,
  "annual_budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the organization */,
  "number_of_branches" INTEGER /* Number of branches the organization has */,
  "number_of_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff members across all branches */,
  "number_of_volunteers" INTEGER /* Number of volunteers across all branches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the branch belongs to */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "branch_type" TEXT /* Type of the branch (e.g., Red Cross / Red Crescent) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the branch is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the branch is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the branch */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the branch */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the branch */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the branch's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the branch's location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch manager */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the branch was established */,
  "number_of_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff members in the branch */,
  "number_of_volunteers" INTEGER /* Number of volunteers in the branch */,
  "annual_budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the branch */,
  "key_initiatives" TEXT /* JSON string containing key initiatives or projects of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the staff member works in */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member started working */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member ended working (if applicable) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member works in */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member's supervisor */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., full-time, part-time, temporary) */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the staff member */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the staff member (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair) */,
  "training_completed" TEXT /* JSON string containing training programs completed by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the volunteer works in */,
  "volunteer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the volunteer */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the volunteer started working */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the volunteer ended working (if applicable) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the volunteer works in */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer's supervisor */,
  "hours_worked" INTEGER /* Total hours worked by the volunteer */,
  "training_completed" TEXT /* JSON string containing training programs completed by the volunteer */,
  "commitment_level" TEXT /* Commitment level of the volunteer (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteers_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteers_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch managing the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., Disaster Response, Health Services) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "project_team_size" INTEGER /* Number of people working on the project */,
  "beneficiaries" TEXT /* JSON string containing details of the beneficiaries */,
  "outcomes_achieved" TEXT /* JSON string containing outcomes achieved by the project */,
  "partners" TEXT /* JSON string containing details of project partners */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* JSON string containing details of funding sources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_staff" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member started working on the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member ended working on the project (if applicable) */,
  "hours_contributed" INTEGER /* Total hours contributed by the staff member to the project */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the staff member in the project (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_staff_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_staff_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_volunteers" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the volunteer in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the volunteer started working on the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the volunteer ended working on the project (if applicable) */,
  "hours_contributed" INTEGER /* Total hours contributed by the volunteer to the project */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the volunteer in the project (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_volunteers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_volunteers_volunteer_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteer_id") REFERENCES volunteers ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch that generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly, Annual) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience of the report (e.g., Internal, External) */,
  "report_keywords" TEXT /* JSON string containing keywords for the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final, Published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Branch Manager, Regional Coordinator, Admin) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., branch, project, report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
